ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND(OR(ISCHANGED( Amount_Submitted__c), ISCHANGED( Amount__c), ISCHANGED( Reclaimable_VAT__c), ISCHANGED( VAT_Amount__c), ISCHANGED( Chart_of_Account__c)),NOT(ISCHANGED(Paid__c)) , Paid__c= true)
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Please unchecked the paid to manage Expense
